text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three years spent training with Air Groove are
coming to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gave a performance in the Twinkle Series
worthy of the moniker of Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And even more challenges await us on the
horizon.

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove! Can you tell us about your plans for
the future?

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any intention to run internationally?
Are there any rivals in the younger generation
you have your eye on?

text_block_list.name: Training Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, it's Air Groove! As cool and elegant
as ever!

text_block_list.name: Training Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Look at her, surrounded by reporters like that.
Being the Empress is something else...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the track in search of Air Groove only to
find her in the middle of a crowd of reporters and
other Umamusume.
choice_data_list: (I'm getting a weird sense of deja vu...)
(I'm getting a weird sense of deja vu...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember back when I spent a whole day biding
my time and waiting for a chance to talk to Air
Groove because she seemed so busy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She realized what I was doing back then and gave
me a stern talking-to after.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's odd, but that memory is strangely comforting
now. I keep my gaze focused on her, and...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...Apologies, I must be going. My trainer needs
me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove takes my hand and pulls me away with
her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious, the reporters have been out
in full force recently. It really makes it difficult to
practice.
choice_data_list:
Did we have to come all the way back to my
office, though?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It can't be helped. We're least likely to be
bothered here.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I have something to say to
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What was with that show earlier? That's how you
think you can get my attention?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were like a sigh in the wind. You need to do
much better than that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What am I going to do with you? Puff out that
chest! Be more confident!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: After all... you're this empress's trainer.
